subject: Snover, a small tree-like Pokemon with a white snowy triangular cap and dark blue-green leafy body, in an action pose amid ice and snow effects
description: A small Pokemon shaped like a snow-capped sapling stands in an energetic action pose. Its upper body is covered by a broad white triangular cap resembling a snow-laden tree-tip or pointed hat. Its lower body and arms are composed of dark teal-green leaf or bark segments. Red speed-lines and blue-white ice-shard burst effects radiate outward from the creature, conveying movement and impact. The overall composition is dynamic against a cool blue-white background.
foreground: Small snow-capped tree-like Pokemon in action pose amid ice burst effects
background: Ice-shard burst effects in blue and white with red speed-lines
emotion: determined, mid-strike — active pose with radiating energy
